name: nexari-android
description: Nexari Signage — Android player (WebView host around @signage/player-web). Targets phones, tablets, Android TV, and Fire TV.

scripts.build: node scripts/sync-player-web.cjs && cd android && (./gradlew assembleSelfRelease || gradlew.bat assembleSelfRelease)
scripts.build:dev: node scripts/sync-player-web.cjs && cd android && (./gradlew assembleDevDebug || gradlew.bat assembleDevDebug)
scripts.build:debug: node scripts/sync-player-web.cjs && cd android && (./gradlew assembleSelfDebug || gradlew.bat assembleSelfDebug)
